# Lint Deck

> Desktop Biome rule review app for generating custom biome.json lint configurations.

Lint Deck helps developers import an existing Biome config, skip explicitly configured rules, review the remaining linter rules in a focused deck, and export a generated biome.json.

## Links

- Site: https://rule-deck.marlonpassos.com.br/
- Source: https://github.com/MarlonPassos-git/lint-deck
- Biome: https://biomejs.dev/

## Topics

Biome, lint rules, biome.json, React, Vite, TypeScript, developer tools.
